gauge.name: Twelvepole Creek near Wayne

impacts.statement: Church and grocery store on WV Route 152 at Garret Drive intersection floods.
Businesses on WV Route 152 at Cox Road intersection flood.
Mobile home park on Mose Asbury Road floods at 29 to 30 feet. Wayne County Highschool entrance floods.
Homes on Front Street adjacent to the creek flood. WV Route 152 and County Route 37/152 flood in town. Railroad tracks above the Route 152 bridge flood. Wayne County High School parking lot floods.
Wayne County Health Department on Kenova Avenue floods.
Mobile home park on Bluefield Street and homes on Bridge Street flood. Section of WV Route 152 at Garrett Creek along with used auto business begin to flood.
River Street and Front Street flood.
Wayne Volunteer Fire Department begins to flood on lower level. Water treatment plant on Bluefield Street begins to flood.
Shirley Burgess Park Road begins to flood.
Athletic fields in Shirley Burgess Park flood due to backwater flooding from Garrett Creek.
Bridge Street near the creek floods. Wayne City Park floods at 19 to 20 feet.
Low sections of Mose Asbury Road flood.
Athletic fields at Twelvepole Valley Park flood.

Shirley Burgess Park at 23 to 24 feet
Shirley Burgess Park on WV Route 152 floods at 21 feet; Shirley Burgess Park Road floods at 25 feet
Wayne County High School parking lot floods at 28 feet and the entrance floods at 29 feet
Lower level of Wayne Volunteer Fire Department floods at 26 feet
Church and grocery store on WV Route 152 at Garret Drive flood at 34 feet
Businesses on WV Route 152 at Cox Road flood at 31 feet

value.label: North American Vertical Datum of 1988
value.description: A fixed reference for elevations determined by geodetic leveling. The datum was derived from a general adjustment of the first-order terrestrial leveling nets of the United States, Canada, and Mexico. In the adjustment, only the height of the primary tidal bench mark, referenced to the International Great Lakes Datum of 1985 (IGLD 85) local mean sea level height value, at Father Point, Rimouski, Quebec, Canada was held fixed, thus providing minimum constraint. NAVD 88 and IGLD 85 are identical. However, NAVD 88 bench mark values are given in Helmert orthometric height units while IGLD 85 values are in dynamic heights. See International Great Lakes Datum of 1985, National Geodetic Vertical Datum of 1929, and geopotential difference. NAVD 88 should not be used as Mean Sea Level.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
